item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Monk's Journey III
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's path to becoming a realm-renowned monk─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level monk to 80 and complete all job quests up through “A Monk's Legacy.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
